item.title: US IPO hopefuls forge ahead with listing plans amid market swings
item.description: A slew of companies across sectors, from biotech to real estate investment trust, launched IPO roadshows on вҖӢMonday, as issuers prepare to go ahead with their listing вҖҢplans amid the Middle East conflict.

item.title: Meta poised to surpass Google in digital ad revenue for first time, report says
item.description: Meta Platforms is projected to surpass Alphabet's Google in digital advertising revenue globally by the end of 2026, and вҖӢdethrone the search-engine behemoth in the lucrative business, according to вҖҢEmarketer.

item.title: LVMH flags sales impact of Iran war in blow to hopes for luxury revival
item.description: French luxury giant LVMH suffered a heavy impact from the Middle Eastern conflict, it said on Monday, as sales вҖӢfell in the Gulf and many rich tourists from the region also stopped spending in Europe.

item.title: J.P.Morgan, Morgan Stanley urge buying the dip as US earnings stay resilient
item.description: Wall Street brokerages J.P.Morgan and Morgan Stanley said recent market weakness has created opportunities for long-term investors, arguing that resilient corporate earnings growth could cushion the fallout from the Middle East вҖӢconflict.

item.title: Bezos-backed EV firm Slate Auto raises $650 million
item.description: Electric vehicle company Slate Auto on Monday said it has raised $650 million in вҖӢa Series C funding round, as вҖҢthe Jeff Bezos-backed firm gears up to deliver its first vehicles late this year.

item.title: Uber faces second driver sexual assault trial followingВ $8.5 million verdict
item.description: After a key setback in the first trial of its kind before a federal jury, Uber вҖӢis expected to return to court on Tuesday to face a second woman's claims that she was sexually assaulted by вҖҢa driver she booked through the app.

item.title: China's Geely launches new hybrid system to challenge Japanese dominance
item.description: Geely Auto on Monday launched its i-HEV Intelligent Hybrid system, aiming to challenge the dominance of Japanese automakers in the conventional вҖӢhybrid vehicle segment by improving fuel efficiency and intelligence capabilities.

item.title: Iran war weighs on global economy as IMF meeting starts
item.description: Alarm over the impact of the Iran war on the global economy grew on Monday with more countries announcing emergency support measures to combat rising energy costs, while others appealed for international вҖӢsupport.

item.title: US existing home sales drop to nine-month low in March amid tight supply
item.description: U.S. existing home sales fell to a nine-month low in March amid tight inventory вҖӢand growing concerns over the labor market, and a recent increase in mortgage rates because of the war with вҖҢIran could limit activity this year.

item.title: Dutch regulator notifies European Commission of plan to seek EU approval for Tesla's FSD
item.description: The Dutch vehicle вҖӢauthority RDW вҖҢhas notified the European вҖӢCommission вҖӢof its plan to вҒ seek вҖӢEuropean Union-wide вҖӢapproval for Tesla's Full-Self Driving вҖӢsystem, Bernd вҖӢvan Nieuwenhoven, general вҖҢmanager вҒ of type approvals at the вҖӢregulator, вҖӢtold вҒ Reuters on Monday.

item.title: UK to probe Paramount-Warner Bros deal in coming weeks, competition watchdog says
item.description: Britain's antitrust watchdog is expected to launch an investigation into Paramount Skydance's planned $110 billion acquisition of вҖӢWarner Bros Discovery in "the coming weeks," вҖҢa spokesperson said on Monday.

item.title: Roblox to introduce age-based accounts in child safety push
item.description: Videogame platform Roblox on Monday said it will create tailored accounts for young users in a push to shore вҖӢup online safety, as it deals with intense global вҖҢscrutiny over concerns of child endangerment.

item.title: Tesco partners with Adobe to ramp up AIвҖ‘driven personalised marketing
item.description: Tesco, Britain's biggest food retailer, has partnered with U.S. software group Adobe to deepen its use of artificial intelligence вҖӢin analysing customer data, aiming to boost sales through вҖҢmore personalised marketing, the groups said on Monday.

item.title: OPEC lowers second-quarter global oil demand forecast on Iran war
item.description: OPEC on Monday lowered its forecast for world oil demand in the second quarter by 500,000 barrels per day, the producer group's monthly oil report showed in its first public assessment of the Iran war's impact вҖӢon the market.

item.title: Bill Ackman kicks off roadshow for combined IPO of Pershing Square, new fund
item.description: Bill Ackman's Pershing Square kicked off a roadshow for the U.S. initial вҖӢpublic offerings of the billionaire investor's management company and a new вҖҢfund on Monday.

item.title: Conagra Brands names J.M. Smucker executive John Brase as new CEO
item.description: Conagra Brands named J.M. Smucker вҖӢexecutive John Brase as вҖҢits new CEO, succeeding Sean Connolly, who will step down after вҖӢmore than a decade вҖӢat the helm of the вҒ packaged food maker.

item.title: Goldman Sachs posts higher profit on strength in dealmaking, equities trading
item.description: Goldman Sachs posted a rise in first-quarter profit on Monday, as the Wall Street giant benefited from strength in dealmaking and equities trading.

item.title: Social media platforms need to stop never-ending scrolling, UK's Starmer says
item.description: Social media platforms such as Instagram and TikTok need to take action to stop young users wasting hours вҖӢmindlessly scrolling never-ending videos, British Prime Minister Keir вҖҢStarmer said on Monday.

item.title: REIT National Healthcare aims $1.1 billion in valuation in US IPO
item.description: National Healthcare Properties said on Monday it was targeting a valuation of about $1.1 billion in вҖӢits U.S. initial public offering, the second real вҖҢestate investment trust to hit the new listings markets in recent weeks.

item.title: Morning Bid: Blockade takes its toll
item.description: What matters in U.S. and global markets today

item.title: Morgan Stanley maintains oil price forecasts and predicts slow recovery in supply
item.description: Morgan Stanley left its Brent crude oil price forecasts unchanged on Monday, at $110 a barrel for вҖӢthe second quarter of 2026 and $100 a вҖҢbarrel in the third quarter, falling to $80 a barrel in 2027.

item.title: Hedge funds rush into bullish stocks bets ahead of weekend US-Iran talks, Goldman note says
item.description: Hedge funds last week piled into bets that stocks would rise, on вҖӢexpectations of a ceasefire in Iran, said two вҖҢGoldman Sachs client notes on Saturday and seen by Reuters on Monday.

item.title: Traton truck deliveries fall 6% in first quarter as US weakness persists
item.description: German truck manufacturer Traton reported a 6% drop вҖӢin vehicle sales for the first quarter of вҖҢ2026 on Monday, driven by a 21% decline in its U.S.-based International Motors brand.

item.title: Wall Street futures drop after US-Iran peace talks fail
item.description: Wall вҖӢStreet futures slipped on Monday, starting the week on a subdued note, after вҖҢtalks between the U.S. and Iran over the weekend failed to deliver a deal to end the war.

item.title: Volkswagen posts weak start to year as China, US demand slumps further
item.description: Volkswagen вҖӢreported a dip in global deliveries вҖҢat the start of the year, falling 4% year on year in the first three вҖӢmonths of 2026, as the German вҖӢcarmaker battles with weak demand in вҒ China and the United States.

item.title: Audi Q1 deliveries fall 6.1% on weak demand in China and North America
item.description: Volkswagen's premium brand Audi on Monday said its first-quarter deliveries fell 6.1%, вҖӢweighed down by weaker demand in вҖҢChina and North America.

item.title: Exclusive: Chilean copper miner Codelco, contractors fined after deadly mine collapse
item.description: Chilean state copper miner Codelco was fined by labor authorities after last year's deadly collapse at its El Teniente mine, while three contractors whose workers were killed or injured were sanctioned more heavily, according to inspection records obtained by Reuters through public-records requests.

item.title: China poised for Q1 GDP growth rebound but Iran war dims 2026 outlook: Reuters poll
item.description: China's economy likely regained some momentum in the first quarter on solid вҖҢexports, but growth is expected to cool over the rest of 2026 as the Middle East crisis threatens to choke corporate profits and sap overseas demand, a Reuters poll showed.

item.title: World Bank chief sounds alarm about looming jobs crisis even after war ends
item.description: The Middle East war will dominate global finance officials' talks this week in Washington, but World Bank President Ajay Banga is sounding вҖӢthe alarm about a bigger, looming crisis: a huge gap in jobs for the 1.2 billion people who will reach working age in developing вҖҢcountries in the next 10 to 15 years.

item.title: Chinese AI startup StepFun to unwind offshore structure to pave way for IPO, sources say
item.description: Chinese AI agent StepFun is unwinding its offshore incorporation structure to pave the way for a planned Hong Kong initial public offering, three sources said, вҖӢas Beijing tightens scrutiny of a system widely used for overseas fundraising.
